Problem Set 4

  1. Read in data
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)

pitches = read.csv('pitchfx_2015.csv')
head(pitches)
  1. Filter only strikes and balls
called_pitches <- pitches %>%
  mutate(Call = ifelse(Description == "Called Strike", "1", "0"))  %>% 
  filter(Description %in% c("Called Strike", "Ball"))

called_pitches
  1. Plot
g <- ggplot(data = called_pitches)
called_pitches
  1. Make probability heatmap
g <- g + stat_summary_2d(mapping = aes(x = X, y = Z, z = Call))
g

NBA Shooting Statistics

  1. Load data
raw_boxscore = read.csv('nba_boxscore.csv')
head(raw_boxscore)
  1. EDA
raw_boxscore %>% select(Tm) %>% table()
Tm
 ATL  BOS  BRK  CHA  CHH  CHI  CHO  CLE  DAL  DEN  DET  GSW  HOU  IND  LAC  LAL  MEM  MIA  MIL  MIN  NJN  NOH  NOK  NOP 
 347  350   72  183  101  335   34  359  356  354  321  355  359  319  347  319  271  348  337  328  298  161   34   63 
 NYK  OKC  ORL  PHI  PHO  POR  SAC  SAS  SEA  TOR  TOT  UTA  VAN  WAS  WSB 
 345  144  340  352  348  338  332  342  195  366 1047  309   80  333   15 
raw_boxscore %>% filter(Tm == "WSB")
  1. clean data: remove player totals, group with season and Tm, compute statistics for each team’s seasons, get percentages, then ungroup
team_boxscore <- raw_boxscore %>% 
  filter(Tm != 'TOT') %>% #filter out TOT
  group_by(Season, Tm) %>% #grouping by season and team
  summarise(
    FGM = sum(FGM), # field goals made
    FGA = sum(FGA), # field goals attempted
    TPA = sum(TPA), # three point attempts
    TPM = sum(TPM), # three point made
    FTM = sum(FTM), # free throws made
    FTA = sum(FTA), # free throws attempted
    PTS = sum(PTS) # total points scored
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    FGP = FGM / FGA, # field goal percentage
    TPP = TPM / TPA, # three point percentage
    FTP = FTM / FTA, # free throw percentage
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
`summarise()` has grouped output by 'Season'. You can override using the `.groups` argument.
head(team_boxscore)
  1. Use filter to select only BOS, CLE, DAL, DET, GSW, LAL, MIA, and SAS.
library(paletteer)

reduced_boxscore <- team_boxscore %>%
  filter(Tm %in% c("BOS", "CLE", "DAL", "DET", "GSW", "LAL", "MIA", "SAS"))

colors <- pnw_palette("Bay", 8)

ggplot(reduced_boxscore, aes(x = Season, y = FGP, color = Tm)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "Field Goal Percentage Over Seasons",
       x = "Season",
       y = "Field Goal Percentage") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors)

  1. Pivot long to plot percentages
boxscore_long <- reduced_boxscore %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(FGP, TPP, FTP), 
               names_to = "Statistic", 
               values_to = "Percentage")

ggplot(boxscore_long, aes(x = Season, y = Percentage, color = Statistic)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "Team Shooting Percentages Over Seasons",
       x = "Season",
       y = "Percentage") +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap(~Tm) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FGP" = "palegreen3", "TPP" = "lightblue", "FTP" = "lightcoral"))

install.packages("paletteer")
G3;also installing the dependency ‘prismatic’
